REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN DOE, JANE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 152 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134; COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN DOE, JANE DOES 1 - 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
